material: Unknown cast alloy; provisional routing assumes a machinable automotive casting alloy per confirmed drawing/model material.

sub_operations.operation_name: Produce near-net cast housing blank with ribs, pockets, bosses, annular body, clevis lugs and machining stock

calculation_notes: Outside process — no in-house cycle time.

sub_operations.operation_name: Trim gates/risers, shot-blast, remove flash, and stress-relieve or age casting per material specification

calculation_notes: Outside process — no in-house cycle time.

setups.setup_name: Rough machine provisional datum A pads and support faces

sub_operations.operation_name: Rough face mill 4× Ø40 datum target pads A1-A4 and adjacent support faces below cast skin
Inspect rough datum A cleanup and remaining machining stock distribution

setups.setup_name: VMC rough all machined features from provisional datum A

sub_operations.operation_name: Spot rough hole locations for B/C bores, central bore, clevis holes and four M10 insert positions
Rough peck drill/open B/C datum-bores and clevis/lug holes leaving finish stock
Rough bore/interpolate central datum D bore and coaxial central bore train
Rough mill clevis fork slots and lug face stock
Rough profile clean-up on exterior perimeter, annular cast bosses, ribs/pocket edges where controlled by model
Rough drill four M10 insert/nut pilot locations

setups.setup_name: Finish datum A pad set and controlled support faces

sub_operations.operation_name: Finish face mill 4× Ø40 datum target pads and controlled support surfaces to flatness/profile requirement
Inspect final datum A pad pattern, common-zone flatness and profile relationship

setups.setup_name: Finish datum B/C bores and central D/coaxial bore stack

sub_operations.operation_name: Final drill/size-prep 2× Ø16.90 datum bores B and C for reaming
Ream 2× Ø16.90 datum bores B and C to 16.85–16.95 mm limits
Finish bore Ø72.04 datum D and Ø70.00 central stepped bore surfaces
Finish circular-interpolate coaxial Ø74, Ø82, Ø90.02 steps, annular profile, draft and R3 relief surfaces
Inspect datum B/C/D bore sizes and coaxial central feature relationship

setups.setup_name: Finish clevis slots, lug holes, stepped walls and controlled perimeter

sub_operations.operation_name: Finish mill 2× clevis fork slots to 55.20 mm and finish inner/outer lug faces
Finish stepped clevis wall stack and shelves per 3.00, 8.50, 11.50 and 15.00 mm dimensions
Finish bore/interpolate clevis/lug Ø30.60 bore
Final drill/size-prep 2× Ø20.10 clevis/lug hole set
Ream 2× Ø20.10 clevis/lug hole set to 20.00–20.20 mm limits
Final drill/size-prep 2× Ø10.50 clevis holes
Ream 2× Ø10.50 clevis holes to 10.35–10.65 mm limits
Finish controlled exterior perimeter profile, R20.0 and R18.5 radii, and typical rib/wall profile references
Mill Detail Y local 2× 1.0 mm / 10° chamfers and reliefs

setups.setup_name: SPM finish four M10 insert-nut recess pattern

sub_operations.operation_name: Spot 4× M10 insert/nut final locations
Final drill 4× M10 insert/nut holes per confirmed insert design
Counterbore/spotface 4× insert-nut recesses to 17.50 mm depth
Inspect M10 insert recess depth, boss pattern position and flushness allowance

setups.setup_name: Deburr, edge break, clean and mark

sub_operations.operation_name: Break all sharp edges 0.5 mm max and deburr hole/slot exits
Clean housing to remove chips, abrasive residue and oils before insert installation
Mark part number/customer part/date code/cavity number per 3 mm character height and 0.3 mm raised/indent note

setups.setup_name: Zn-Ni coat or receive coated insert nuts

sub_operations.operation_name: Apply/verify Zn-Ni coating on 4× M10 insert nuts and verify 6H thread after coating
Install/press/stake 4× Zn-Ni coated M10×1.5-6H insert nuts into 17.50 mm recesses
Perform nut push-out, nut anti-rotate torque and required bracket validation tests per control plan
Final dimensional, thread, coating/insert, profile/position and visual inspection
